loop1.title: Live Operations & Runtime
loop1.note: Showing load factor as a proxy for runtime/availability metrics — no dedicated run-hours, starts, or service-interval columns are measured by this electrical meter.

loop1.title: Energy & Reliability
loop1.note: Showing total active energy and power factor — MTBF/MTTR are not measured for this asset; Apparent Energy and Power Factor are used to fill the reliability slots.

loop1.title: Power Energy Analysis
loop1.note: Showing current, voltage, and unbalance metrics for DG-1; sag/swell/neutral events and max/min voltages are not measured by this meter.
